_comment: Mechanic -> {wp, decision} provenance for the card mechanic ledgers (scripts/hero-mechanic-ledger.mjs and future villain/mastermind/scheme ledgers). Incrementally backfilled: a new mechanic-implementing WP adds its entry here. A missing key (or empty string) means 'not yet attributed' -- the ledger shows it blank rather than guessing. The handler column is auto-derived by the generator for executable mechanics; this file only carries wp/decision. Only mappings confirmed from WORK_INDEX / STATUS are seeded below; the rest await backfill.
